image:image.image:title: Aniket Abhishek Soni — Senior Data Engineer
image:image.image:caption: Aniket Abhishek Soni, Senior Data Engineer, published researcher, and IEEE Senior Member based in New York, US.

image:image.image:title: Aniket Abhishek Soni — Published Researcher and IEEE Senior Member
image:image.image:caption: Portrait of Aniket Abhishek Soni, author of two books and 20+ peer-reviewed papers in AI and data engineering.

image:image.image:title: Aniket Abhishek Soni — International Speaker and Judge
image:image.image:caption: Aniket Abhishek Soni, international speaker, award judge, and AFCEA 40 Under Forty recipient.
